{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323160312763744A21D388AF198FC"}"},"total":4912},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7502720725697135384","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我滴妈，在大量的梗里面找到了少量的小说，全程记仇，模拟外没吃过亏，模拟里吃的亏直接下次或下下次报仇，好好好针眼云"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746867306,"group_id":"7478719865298111550","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"撒~细数你的罪恶吧！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0Fa3TPUzHkE8zLsK3NKjNo=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e3a34e40f2e441d7adea66461ba75a92~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791520&x-signature=%2FNec4NJhDEUFRKCoWQ3LPHXLbdI%3D","user_id":"175556710107044","user_name":"黑“猫”"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"175556710107044","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1695741819,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7478719865298111550","book_info":{"abstract":"【模拟+熬寿加资质+不压战力+快节奏+主角中立，随心所欲】
　　纯粹的武道世界，云寿本以为凭着手上的弱挂只能平凡一生……
　　直到那年十四，第二个带着缺陷的模拟器到手。
　　可他没想到，两挂相合，便是天下无敌！
　　匆匆岁月（其实没多久）后，云寿蓦然回首，
